label: ESSAY / ISSUE No. 07 / FEATURED
title: Abdullah ibn al-Zubayr Was Right — and the Silence Around Him Is the Point
dek: The man who held Mecca for nine years against an empire has been written out of the Islamic political imagination. This is not accident. This is Umayyad historiography doing what it was built to do.
author: By Mustafa Al-Husayni
